TH_RIN-BARROW.title: Rin's Cat Cart
TH_RIN-BARROW.description:
At the start of combat, create [gold]Wraiths[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Corpses[/gold] stored in this relic.
Whenever an enemy dies, store its corresponding [gold]Corpse[/gold].
[gold]Right-click this relic[/gold] to view the [gold]Corpses[/gold] you own.
TH_RIN-BARROW.flavor: The cart Rin uses to carry corpses. It's probably the cart that has carried the most corpses in this world.
TH_RIN-BARROW.desc: These are all the [gold]Corpses[/gold] stored in your cart.
TH_RIN-BARROW.confirmdelete: Are you sure you want to discard this [gold]Corpse[/gold]?
TH_RIN-BASIC_BARROW.title: Corpse Cart
TH_RIN-BASIC_BARROW.description:
Whenever an enemy dies, store its corresponding [gold]Corpse[/gold].
[gold]Right-click this relic[/gold] to view the [gold]Corpses[/gold] you own.
TH_RIN-BASIC_BARROW.flavor: A small cart covered with a white cloth, looks like it can be used to store corpses.
TH_RIN-BASIC_BARROW.desc: These are all the [gold]Corpses[/gold] stored in your cart.
TH_RIN-BASIC_BARROW.confirmdelete: Are you sure you want to discard this [gold]Corpse[/gold]?
TH_RIN-CAT_COLLAR.title: Cat Collar
TH_RIN-CAT_COLLAR.description: When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue] or below, there is a [blue]50%[/blue] chance to heal to [blue]10%[/blue] of Max HP instead.
TH_RIN-CAT_COLLAR.flavor: A pink cat collar. Perhaps it was worn by the cat in Schrödinger's experiment?
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_CLAW.title: Dead Cat Claw
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_CLAW.description:
[gold]Right-click this relic[/gold] to lose [blue]1[/blue] Max HP and increase this relic's count and count cap by [blue]3[/blue].
Whenever you lose HP, consume count and reduce the HP loss by that amount. The count resets to the cap at the start of each combat.
(Current cap: [blue]{Cards}[/blue])
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_CLAW.flavor: A part of a dead black cat's corpse, known as the claw.
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_CORPSE.title: Dead Cat
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_CORPSE.description:
Upon pickup, change your Max HP to [blue]10[/blue].
When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue] or below, fully heal instead.
([purple]{Cards}[/purple] remaining.)
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_CORPSE.flavor: The complete corpse of a dead black cat, regenerated by the entanglement of curse and blessing.
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_HEAD.title: Dead Cat Head
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_HEAD.description: At the start of your turn, create [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_HEAD.flavor: A part of a dead black cat's corpse, known as the head.
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_EYES.title: Dead Cat Eyes
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_EYES.description: Your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is now displayed in the order cards will be drawn from front to back.
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_EYES.flavor: A part of a dead black cat's corpse, known as the eyes.
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_TAIL.title: Dead Cat Tail
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_TAIL.description: At the end of combat, there is a [blue]66%[/blue] chance to gain an extra random [gold]Relic[/gold].
TH_RIN-DEAD_CAT_TAIL.flavor: A part of a dead black cat's corpse, known as the tail.
TH_RIN-ROSE_MOONCAKE.title: Rose Mooncake
TH_RIN-ROSE_MOONCAKE.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].
TH_RIN-ROSE_MOONCAKE.flavor: A heartfelt mooncake made by Lady Satori herself, specially filled with rose!
TH_RIN-CATTAIL.title: Cattail
TH_RIN-CATTAIL.description: Whenever damage originating from you causes an enemy to lose HP, make it lose an additional [blue]1[/blue] HP.
TH_RIN-CATTAIL.flavor: "Ooh!" says Cattail, "Ooh ooh ooh! Does it confuse you? Just because you see 'cat' in my name and I look like a cat, don't expect me to 'meow' like a cat, okay?
TH_RIN-POWER_CARD_CAR.title: Ghost Transport Cart
TH_RIN-POWER_CARD_CAR.description: [gold]Wraiths[/gold] now cause all enemies to lose HP.
TH_RIN-POWER_CARD_CAR.flavor: One of Rin's abilities, from the hand of the Market God. The holder can fire ghost bullets that pierce enemies.
TH_RIN-POWER_CARD_SOUL.title: Make Peace with Cats
TH_RIN-POWER_CARD_SOUL.description: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Wraiths[/gold], consume all [gold]Wraiths[/gold] and put an equal number of [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
TH_RIN-POWER_CARD_SOUL.flavor: One of Rin's abilities, from the hand of the Market God. The holder will not bump into pacified spirits.
TH_RIN-MEAT_COOKER.title: Grilling Kit
TH_RIN-MEAT_COOKER.description:
Attacking an enemy with [gold]Ignite[/gold] reduces [gold]Integrity[/gold] by an additional [blue]1%[/blue].
Whenever an enemy with [gold]Ignite[/gold] dies, heal [blue]3[/blue] HP.
TH_RIN-MEAT_COOKER.flavor: A set containing various tools for making grilled meat, allowing you to enjoy delicious food instantly during battle!
TH_RIN-WHETSTONE.title: Whetstone
TH_RIN-WHETSTONE.description: Cards with "Claw" in their name deal [blue]6[/blue] more damage.
TH_RIN-WHETSTONE.flavor: A standard-sized whetstone. Can sharpen weapons and restore their sharpness; the same applies to your claws.
TH_RIN-HERO_PROOF.title: Proof of Courage
TH_RIN-HERO_PROOF.description:
In [red]Elite[/red] combats, multiply damage you deal by [blue]2[/blue].
In [purple]Boss[/purple] combats, multiply by [blue]3[/blue].
TH_RIN-HERO_PROOF.flavor: Proof of courage and strength, having defeated the legendary black dragon.
